question: Public visibility change for clockmansy/dinobrain-data; need data repo risk, prior policy, repo separation, and safe GitHub visibility update method.

items.title: Task outcome: Change the GitHub visibility of the DinoBrain repository from private to public after verifying
items.summary: Changed GitHub repository visibility for clockmansy/dinobrain from private to public after verifying the target repository, admin permissions, and a minimal tracked-file secret scan. GitHub connector now reports visibility=public and git ls-remote confirms origin/main remains accessible at 8c8d194ba8c1b79a967d3f690dd20e315793c3d6. The data repository was not changed.

items.title: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Only changed the app repository clockmansy/dinobrain; left dinobrain-data untouched because it contains operational memory/data and prior policy separates app release from data sync.
